playlists.name: Street Cooffe - amapiano Blueprint (45m)
playlists.description: Professional Stage Blueprint optimized for Street Cooffe (Anak muda usia 20-35 tahun yang ingin joget berenergi tinggi). Flow: Mulai dari pemanasan santai 100 BPM lalu naik bertahap ke puncak meledak 128 BPM. Includes Viral Peak Bangers.
playlists.targetMood: Mulai dari pemanasan santai 100 BPM lalu naik bertahap ke puncak meledak 128 BPM
playlists.aiPrompt: Synthesized for Street Cooffe, 45 mins, amapiano, Anak muda usia 20-35 tahun yang ingin joget berenergi tinggi crowd. Viral: true

tracks.title: Love Story ( Amapiano Edit )
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 1 (Intro [VIRAL OPENER]): Establish Street Cooffe vibe at 140 BPM (Key 4B). Master EQ flat, High-pass filter slightly open during intro bars.

tracks.title: HAHAHA (DOLBIE EDIT)
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 2 [PERFECT / Exact phase tempo lock [HYPE VIRAL]]: Loop 32-bar outro of outgoing track; cut Bass EQ on bar 16 while fading in incoming high frequencies. (Adjacent Camelot step (4B → 5B). Energy boost step up (+1).). Energy -> 8/10.

tracks.title: folded amapiano
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 3 [PERFECT / Exact phase tempo lock [HYPE VIRAL]]: Harmonic Key Shift: Execute smooth filter sweep on transition phrase. Swap LOW EQ precisely on beat 1 of drop. (Exact harmonic lock (5B → 5B). Seamless transition.). Energy -> 9/10.

tracks.title: Sialan (Jacksound Afrobeat Edit) [extended]
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 4 [PERFECT / -3 BPM groove decelerate [HYPE VIRAL]]: BPM Phase Alignment: Sync pitch slider smoothly over 16 bars. Use light reverb tail on outgoing vocal. (Exact harmonic lock (5B → 5B). Seamless transition.). Energy -> 10/10.

tracks.title: We Found Love (DJ YAZ 2024 Amapiano Remix)
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 5 [PERFECT / +3 BPM pitch acceleration [HYPE VIRAL]]: Energy Boost Transition: Slam transition on beat 1 or use 8-beat roll build-up for maximum crowd reaction. (Relative major/minor shift (5B → 5A). Smooth emotional mood change.). Energy -> 8/10.

tracks.title: ”stecu” (afro_amapiano) prod.0landrys!
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 6 [PERFECT / Exact phase tempo lock [HYPE VIRAL]]: Smooth Blend: Keep mids balanced at 10 o'clock during overlap. Let incoming bassline take over smoothly. (Adjacent Camelot step (5A → 6A). Energy boost step up (+1).). Energy -> 8/10.

tracks.title: Starboy (Bucks & Miciko Amapiano Edit)
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 7 [PERFECT / -3 BPM groove decelerate [HYPE VIRAL]]: Loop 32-bar outro of outgoing track; cut Bass EQ on bar 16 while fading in incoming high frequencies. (Relative major/minor shift (6A → 6B). Smooth emotional mood change.). Energy -> 9/10.

tracks.title: lush life (Aimar Edit)
tracks.transitionNotes: STAGE CUE 8 [PERFECT / -3 BPM groove decelerate [HYPE VIRAL]]: Harmonic Key Shift: Execute smooth filter sweep on transition phrase. Swap LOW EQ precisely on beat 1 of drop. (Relative major/minor shift (6B → 6A). Smooth emotional mood change.). Energy -> 6/10.
